nasb.text: And his master praised the unrighteous manager because he had acted shrewdly; for the sons of this age are more shrewd in relation to their own kind than the sons of light.

esv.text: The master commended the dishonest manager for his shrewdness. For the sons of this world  are more shrewd in dealing with their own generation than the sons of light.

cnv.text: 主人就誇獎這不義的管家作事機警；因為在應付自己的世事上，今世之子比光明之子更精明。

ccb.text: “主人夸奖这个不义的管家精明。因为今世的儿女在处理世事方面比光明的儿女更精明。

csbs.text: “于是主人因这个不义的管家做事精明，就称赞他。这样看来，今世的儿女在自己的世代里    ，比光明的儿女还要聪明。
